description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and a combination of large glass windows and wooden panel siding. The front facade is dominated by expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a spacious wooden deck, creating a seamless indoor-outdoor transition. The exterior walls are clad in vertical dark wood panels, giving the structure a contemporary yet natural appearance. The roof is complex, with intersecting hips and a subtle overhang that provides shade and architectural interest. Several smaller windows and a round window are distributed asymmetrically along the sides and rear, ensuring ample natural light throughout the interior. The main entrance is recessed and sheltered, with a secondary door visible at the back, and the overall footprint is wide and single-storied.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark hip roof, large glass windows, and wood-paneled siding, featuring a spacious front deck and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: The front view showcases large glass doors and windows opening onto a wide wooden deck, emphasizing the main entrance and outdoor living space.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals vertical wood paneling, smaller windows, and the extension of the wooden deck along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a recessed main entrance, a secondary door, and a mix of small and medium windows, with the roof's intersecting hips clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights a round window, vertical wood siding, and a series of narrow windows, with the deck partially visible at the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and scattered side windows
